prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In the sparkling blue waters of Coral Cove, there lived a little octopus named Ollie. Ollie had eight wiggly arms and a heart full of dreams, but he was very, very shy. Every day, Ollie watched the other sea creatures play hide-and-seek among the swaying seaweed and chase bubbles in the sunshine. Ollie wished he could join them, but he always felt too nervous to say hello. Maybe, just maybe, today would be the day Ollie found the courage to make a new friend.
